text:
is the father of Eren Jaeger and the husband of Carla Jaeger.

Appearance

Grisha wears a white suit with black dress pants, has long, black hair, and wears circular glasses.

Personality

Not much is known about Grisha Jaeger other than that he is Eren's father, he is seen reading a newspaper so it is implied that he likes to read and is oftentimes preoccupied. 

Story

Grisha reads a newspaper while having breakfast.

Relationships

Keith Sadies - Keith makes a mental remark to Grisha about his son, Eren, having become a soldier, which indicates Grisha and Keith are at least acquaintances.
